seoMetadata.title: AI Practitioner & Technology Professional Portfolio
seoMetadata.description: Portfolio of an expert AI practitioner specializing in LLMs, agentic RAG, cloud scaling, and computer vision.
seoMetadata.keywords: AI, Machine Learning, LLM, Agentic RAG, Cloud Architect, React, Next.js

hero.heading: Architecting Autonomous Intelligent Systems
hero.introduction: I design, deploy, and scale production-grade AI agents, LLM architectures, and high-performance machine learning pipelines for complex enterprise workloads.

achievements.title: Professional Cloud Architect
achievements.description: Validation of expertise in designing, developing, and managing robust, secure, scalable, and highly available GCP solutions.

achievements.title: TensorFlow Developer Certificate
achievements.description: Demonstrated proficiency in building and training machine learning models using TensorFlow, including deep learning, computer vision, and NLP.

projects.title: Agentic RAG Engine
projects.description: An autonomous Retrieval-Augmented Generation system featuring self-querying, hybrid semantic search, cross-encoder reranking, and web search fallback logic.

projects.title: Distributed LLM Router
projects.description: A load balancing gateway for LLM requests that optimizes latency, handles provider fallbacks (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini), and caches queries semantically.

experiences.description: Lead the R&D and deployment of agentic workflows. Optimized custom embeddings pipelines and reduced inference latency by 42% through local caching and model quantization.
Designed and productionized real-time computer vision inference systems at scale. Automated pipeline orchestration using Kubernetes and Kubeflow.

services.name: Custom LLM & RAG Orchestration
services.shortDescription: Build domain-specific LLM applications and agent systems integrated with your company database.
services.fullDescription: We build enterprise-grade retrieval-augmented generation systems and agentic workflows. This includes custom document chunking pipelines, embedding fine-tuning, metadata filtering, semantic cache implementations, and robust evaluation suites. Each system is designed with strict boundaries to eliminate hallucinations and secure proprietary data.

services.name: Scalable ML Infrastructure Audit
services.shortDescription: Audit your current inference/training infrastructure and design a cost-efficient cloud migration strategy.
services.fullDescription: Complete audit of your existing model hosting setup. We review GPU utilization, cold-start latencies, serverless inference bottlenecks, and container scheduling. You will receive an actionable terraform-based deployment design that cuts monthly cloud billing by up to 50% while scaling smoothly under traffic spikes.
